focus: Audit/critique/polish/harden command references in impeccable: crosswalk report contract, critique evidence, polish gates, and hardening edge cases onto current sk-design audit mode.

graphEvents.label: sk-design audit contract and report template

label: Targeted post-audit decision question gate
recommendation: Add an optional decision-questions block: ask concrete options when priority, tone, scope, or constraints are unresolved; otherwise state Questions skipped with a reason.

label: Quality-bar intake for polish depth
recommendation: Record quality bar and ship horizon before polish recommendations when ambiguous; scale P3 depth without weakening P0/P1 gates.

label: Drift root-cause taxonomy needs remedy mapping
recommendation: Extend missing-token, one-off-implementation, conceptual-misalignment drift categories with their corresponding owner/fix paths.

label: Emotional journey probe is more specific than emotional fit
recommendation: Add peak/end, high-stakes reassurance, anxiety valley, and recovery-tone probes, with evidence limits.

label: Audit score, P0-P3 severity, report order, positive findings, and owner mapping already exist
Cognitive load, Nielsen heuristics as a lens, personas, and hardening checks already exist
Deterministic scan honesty, clean-scan caveat, browser evidence, overlay honesty, and fallback labels already exist

reason: sk-design deliberately keeps Nielsen as a diagnostic lens feeding the existing /20 score; a parallel score would violate the no-second-scoring-system constraint.

direction: Adopt impeccable critique sub-agent orchestration, detector overlay plumbing, snapshots, trends, or command recommendation mechanics
reason: These are runtime/storage/CLI infrastructure, not sk-design methodology. The reusable evidence semantics are already covered by evidence_capture.md.
